name: Suspicious Scripting in a WMI Consumer
notes:
This rule detects suspicious commands that are related to scripting/powershell in WMI Event Consumers.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Scripting in a WMI Consumer
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious commands that are related to scripting/powershell in WMI Event Consumers


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Notice

when the event matches ((LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%new-object%' and LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%net.webclient%' and LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%.downloadstring%') or (LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%new-object%' and LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%net.webclient%' and LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%.downloadfile%') or (LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '% iex(%' or LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%wscript.shell%' or LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '% -nop %' or LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '% -noprofile %' or LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '% -decode %' or LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '% -enc %') or (LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%wscript.shell%' or LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%system.security.cryptography.frombase64transform%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Scripting in a WMI Consumer on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Notice

AND when the event matches ((LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%new-object%' and LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%net.webclient%' and LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%.downloadstring%') or (LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%new-object%' and LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%net.webclient%' and LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%.downloadfile%') or (LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '% iex(%' or LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%wscript.shell%' or LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '% -nop %' or LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '% -noprofile %' or LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '% -decode %' or LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '% -enc %') or (LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%wscript.shell%' or LOWER("Consumer Destination") LIKE '%system.security.cryptography.frombase64transform%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Scripting in a WMI Consumer
Event description: Detects suspicious commands that are related to scripting/powershell in WMI Event Consumers.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
